name: Spicy Shrimp Shake-in-a-Bag Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Drop the shrimp into a paper bag filled with the crumbs, flour, and spices. Shake the bag to coat the shrimp, and arrange shrimp in a shallow baking pan.
3. Combine the butter and mustard and brush the mixture over the shrimp. Bake for 20 minutes.
